visual_intents.purpose: Open at the true chunk start with a candid creator introduction and the two-year hesitation behind it.

content.title: Two years of trying
content.subtitle: A private creator starts with honesty

visual_intents.style_notes: Candid, unsentimental, animated from the first frame.

motion.animation_notes: Immediate moving title reveal, accent sweep, and subtle background drift to establish an honest field-note tone.

params.title: Two years of trying
params.subtitle: A private creator starts with honesty

visual_intents.purpose: Show the bedroom loop of recording, overwhelm, and not posting as a moving inner spiral.
visual_intents.style_notes: Personal and claustrophobic without melodrama.

motion.animation_notes: Layer notebook fragments inward while a soft spiral line traces repeated attempts.

visual_intents.purpose: Emphasize that trying has meant sitting with the material instead of publishing it.

content.text: trying meant recording, freezing, not posting
content.label: honest context

visual_intents.style_notes: Plainspoken emphasis, no hype language.

motion.animation_notes: Kinetic words enter in staggered lines with a progress stroke across the bottom.

params.text: trying meant recording, freezing, not posting
params.label: honest context

visual_intents.purpose: Separate her approach from generic creator motivation content.
visual_intents.style_notes: Restrained editorial contrast with a clear rejection of generic motivation.

motion.animation_notes: Two panels slide into tension: performance advice on one side, honest documenting on the other.

visual_intents.purpose: Make the phrase about content not being everyone’s cup of tea feel embodied and private.
visual_intents.style_notes: Sensitive, not comedic.

motion.animation_notes: A careful scale moves between posting and privacy while note cards appear along the axis.

visual_intents.purpose: Hold the central confession that this feels really hard for a private person.

content.text: I am a very private person. This feels really hard.
content.label: the hard part

visual_intents.style_notes: Let the vulnerability land without clutter.

motion.animation_notes: Repeat emphasis words through kinetic type while the underline creeps forward.

params.text: I am a very private person. This feels really hard.
params.label: the hard part

visual_intents.purpose: Map her relationship to documenting moments: loving capture, then returning to being present.

stages.label: I love documenting
stages.detail: She is not rejecting the impulse.

stages.label: Room moments
stages.detail: The camera comes out when people are having fun.

stages.label: Then presence
stages.detail: Recording gives way to just being there.

visual_intents.style_notes: Warm, observational, and personal.

motion.animation_notes: Path draws between staged cards as the center badge breathes subtly.

stages.label: I love documenting
stages.detail: She is not rejecting the impulse.

stages.label: Room moments
stages.detail: The camera comes out when people are having fun.

stages.label: Then presence
stages.detail: Recording gives way to just being there.

visual_intents.purpose: Visualize moving between holding the phone and enjoying the room.
visual_intents.style_notes: Fluid motion, not a static list.

motion.animation_notes: Loop cards orbit between camera-in-hand and present-in-room states.

visual_intents.purpose: Show her position between people who constantly record and people who forget the camera.

content.title: Somewhere in between
content.caption: That middle is why it has been hard.

visual_intents.style_notes: Empathetic proof point for the creator’s hesitation.

motion.animation_notes: A marker glides across a two-sided board and settles in the uneasy middle.

params.title: Somewhere in between
params.caption: That middle is why it has been hard.

visual_intents.purpose: Treat the awkward self-conscious interruption as part of the authentic record.
visual_intents.style_notes: Handle the moment gently and without ridicule.

motion.animation_notes: Note cards jitter into place, pause, then reset as if she is stepping away for a second.

visual_intents.purpose: Bridge the cut and recovery after she says she lost that moment.

content.title: Take resumes
content.footer: the cut stays part of the story

visual_intents.style_notes: A transparent edit marker, not a flashy transition.

motion.animation_notes: Timeline ticks advance through a gap and snap back into the take.

params.title: Take resumes
params.footer: the cut stays part of the story

visual_intents.purpose: Declare the actual project: creating content this year as a documented attempt.

content.text: This is my take to create content this year.
content.label: the attempt

visual_intents.style_notes: A clear pivot from hesitation to commitment.

motion.animation_notes: Text enters in three decisive beats with moving accent bars.

params.text: This is my take to create content this year.
params.label: the attempt

visual_intents.purpose: Reveal the promise of the channel: pure me, with no selling.
visual_intents.style_notes: Sincere and sparse, but animated.

motion.animation_notes: Promise items appear one at a time like entries being pinned into a capsule.

visual_intents.purpose: Push back against the fake helpfulness of 'you can do this' advice.

content.title: No selling
content.caption: The questions matter more than advice.

visual_intents.style_notes: Make the refusal visual and specific.

motion.animation_notes: The left panel drains while the right panel gains emphasis around honest questions.

params.title: No selling
params.caption: The questions matter more than advice.

visual_intents.purpose: Collect the questions she wants the journey to answer: what she has done, energy, motivation.

content.title: Questions underneath
items: Where do I get the energy?
content.footer: the journey has to answer these

visual_intents.style_notes: Curious rather than explanatory.

motion.animation_notes: Question cards rise in a stack while the current card is highlighted.

params.title: Questions underneath
items: Where do I get the energy?
params.footer: the journey has to answer these

visual_intents.purpose: Hold the modest hope that if the journey inspires someone, that would be enough.

content.text: If that inspires you, I’ll be the happiest person.
content.label: not the goal, but a hope

visual_intents.style_notes: Keep the hope secondary to honesty.

motion.animation_notes: Quote line types on gently with a small moving highlight, then settles.

params.text: If that inspires you, I’ll be the happiest person.
params.label: not the goal, but a hope

visual_intents.purpose: Make the anti-motivation stance explicit: no fake instructions, no forced journey.

content.title: No fake motivation
content.caption: No one is being instructed here.

visual_intents.style_notes: Firm, clear, not preachy.

motion.animation_notes: Cross out command phrases while the personal-journey side steadies.

params.title: No fake motivation
params.caption: No one is being instructed here.

visual_intents.purpose: Reconnect her personal journey to the long-term reason for documenting it.

stages.detail: Share the attempt while it is happening.

stages.label: Keep a record
stages.detail: Make something future self can return to.

stages.label: No regrets later

visual_intents.style_notes: Recap with forward motion.

motion.animation_notes: Map redraws from present attempt toward future self, with staged cards appearing in sequence.

visual_intents.purpose: Visualize the 50-year-old future self looking back at this younger version without regret.

content.title: For future me
content.footer: a record to look back on

visual_intents.style_notes: Reflective, not sentimental overload.

motion.animation_notes: Archive cards sweep from now to future, then lock into a keepsake timeline.

params.title: For future me
params.footer: a record to look back on

visual_intents.purpose: Close with a short animated goodbye that keeps the direct-to-camera intimacy.
visual_intents.style_notes: Short, human, and uncluttered.

motion.animation_notes: Final line types on, accent completes, and motion fades cleanly before the chunk end.
